title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!
